narrative_seed_by_week.2: What makes a good specification — testable, bounded, observable / Bad spec vs good spec — ‘make it better’ vs ‘rewrite at Grade 8 level, max 80 words’ / Pattern recognition — how machines find rules in repeated data / The 70/30 rule — AI implements, you specify and verify / When NOT to use AI — privacy, precision, legal accountability

lab_activity_seed_by_week.2: Write 5 task specifications — one each for health, transport, education, food, scheduling / Test each spec live with Claude — did you get exactly what you asked for? / Peer review — iterate based on feedback
